Constant.text: Select a target first. This scratch Vizzy only transfers safely to targets orbiting the current body.
Parking orbit reached. Apoapsis {0:n0} km, periapsis {1:n0} km.
Scratch transfer stopped safely. Target {0} does not orbit the current body {1}.
Transfer skipped. This scratch Vizzy only supports targets orbiting {0}; selected target {1} orbits {2}.
Target shares the current body. Waiting Hohmann phase for {0}.
Transfer burn complete. Apoapsis {0:n0} km, periapsis {1:n0} km.
Scratch same-body transfer complete toward {0}. Apoapsis {1:n0} km, periapsis {2:n0} km.
